ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the customer */,
  "credit_score" REAL /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "distance_to_store" REAL /* Distance from the customer's location to the nearest store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Loyalty program ID */,
  "preferred_communication_channel" TEXT /* Preferred communication channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "online_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each online transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the transaction */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the online visit during which the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount_spent" REAL /* Amount spent in the transaction */,
  "items_purchased" INTEGER /* Number of items purchased in the transaction */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_online_transactions_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES online_visits ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_online_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each in-store transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount_spent" REAL /* Amount spent in the transaction */,
  "items_purchased" INTEGER /* Number of items purchased in the transaction */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who assisted the customer */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion applied to the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "online_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each online visit */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the visit */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the visit */,
  "pages_visited" INTEGER /* Number of pages visited during the session */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the referral */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the visit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_online_visits_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the store */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the store record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the store record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_satisfaction" (
  "satisfaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satisfaction record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the satisfaction score */,
  "service_satisfaction" REAL /* Satisfaction score for service (1-5) */,
  "selection_satisfaction" REAL /* Satisfaction score for selection (1-5) */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the satisfaction survey was conducted */,
  "survey_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the survey was conducted */,
  "survey_response_rate" REAL /* Response rate for the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the satisfaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the satisfaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_satisfaction_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "budget_allocations" TEXT /* Budget allocations for different channels */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign target */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target customer */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer was targeted */,
  "target_segment" TEXT /* Segment of the target customer */,
  "target_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the target customer will be reached */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targets_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_targets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign result */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who responded to the campaign */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response type (e.g., opened, clicked, purchased) */,
  "conversion" INTEGER /* Conversion status (true/false) */,
  "amount_spent" REAL /* Amount spent by the customer as a result of the campaign */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate for the campaign */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate for the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_results_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_results_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions for the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., customer, transaction, campaign) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID associated with the access event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
